title: Bleach Custom GUI Pack
body: **![](https://img34.picturelol.com/th/57470/awth92dyashv.jpg)** **It's GUI ONLY Resource pack so you can freely use it with other resource packs. Just place it on top of resource pack you use.** **This is a GUI packed themed towards the show "Bleach". Don't hesitate to comment down below, I have even changed hot bar as well hope you enjoy. I have taken the opportunity to experiment with adding different pictures to each container. The palette that I choose is White & Orange but maybe in the future, If you guys want other colors like Red & Black or any colors else.** **please tell me I will think about it!** **If you found any bugs please report to me I will fix it as soon as I can.** **Community Engagement:** Feel free to leave comments or report any issues so I can make the necessary updates. **If you found any bugs please report to me I will fix it as soon as I can.** [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) **Images** **Hud** **![](https://i.imgur.com/oubsh48.png)** **Setting** **![](https://i.imgur.com/EXnIXaQ.png)** **Chest** **![](https://i.imgur.com/IFYj4dd.png)** **Crafting Table** **![](https://i.imgur.com/xKxgBDR.png)** **Anvil** **![](https://i.imgur.com/9I1CO9d.png)** **Furnace** **![](https://i.imgur.com/7ALTSRi.png)** **Brewing Stand** **![](https://i.imgur.com/k0LpHkm.png)** ****Dispenser**** ****![](https://i.imgur.com/JTI15iK.png)**** ****Loom**** ****![](https://i.imgur.com/23SQoFe.png)**** ****Enchantment**** ****![](https://i.imgur.com/7JyGfHQ.png)**** ****Shulker Box**** ****![](https://i.imgur.com/4axd21p.png)**** **Smithing Table** **![](https://i.imgur.com/E87mIbZ.png)** **Horse Inventory** **![](https://i.imgur.com/klwIMOF.png)** **Beacon Menu** **![](https://i.imgur.com/l9cYWju.png)** ****Villager** **Trading Menu**** **![](https://i.imgur.com/UTiEef0.png)** **Additional Resources:** - Explore more packs on [ListarMC](https://listarmc.com/) - Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest new packs, vote on upcoming designs, and participate in anime discussions. **Thank you for your support! ❤️**
